---
title: "Biol 6100 Portfolio"
author: "Anushka Canfield"
date: "Spring 2024"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: spacelab
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
#

#### **Blurb**

Hello! My name is Anushka and I am a Junior at UVM with a major in Molecular Genetics and a minor in Bioinformatics. I plan to graduate Fall 2024 and I will hopefully get accepted into a PHD research program.

#

#### **Assignments:**
- [Homework 01]()
- [Homework 02](homework_02.html)
- [Homework 03](homework_03.html)
- Homework 04
- Homework 05
- Homework 06
- Homework 07
- Homework 08
- Homework 09
- Homework 10
- Homework 11
- Homework 12
